title: Housing benefit expansion
text: The proposed housing benefit increase would finally give low-income renters breathing room and reduce evictions in high-cost cities.

title: Fuel tax freeze
text: Freezing the fuel tax may help drivers now, but it delays the transition to cleaner transport and leaves future costs untouched.

title: Tuition cap briefing
text: Officials released the implementation timetable for the tuition cap and listed the agencies responsible for enforcement.

title: School meal programme
text: The school meal programme is a sensible reform, although the rollout plan still leaves rural schools underfunded.

title: Border processing bill
text: This border processing bill is punitive, expensive, and unlikely to solve the administrative backlog it claims to address.

title: Industrial subsidy package
text: The industrial subsidy package could protect jobs in the short term, but the accountability rules remain too weak.
